name: Cyrus' Decree
notes: The Hebrew Bible closes and Ezra opens on the same words. Chronicles ends mid-proclamation with Cyrus' charge to go up; Ezra repeats it and continues. Chronicles' single closing verse (36:23) is split across two verses in Ezra (1:2-3), so both are linked to it. Ezra 1:4, the provision for those who remain, has no counterpart in Chronicles and is left unlinked.

links.label: the first year of Cyrus king of Persia
Thus saith Cyrus king of Persia
Who is there among you of all his people
